title: [FEAT] Added the .npmrc for the NPM Packages to be connected with mono-repo
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Packing up the pollen
gist.blurb: We've updated our package configurations to streamline publishing to GitHub Packages. Better attribution, funding links, and mono-repo harmony!
gist.summary: Added .npmrc files and updated package.json metadata across the mcp, ompc, and sdk packages to configure publishing to GitHub Packages.
gist.impact: This standardizes our package publishing pipeline and ensures proper contributor attribution and funding links.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing small pixelated boxes (packages) in a cozy warehouse or garden shed setting. The boxes represent the npm packages being prepped for the registry.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny worker's apron, neatly stacking small pixelated cardboard boxes in a warm garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
